title: HitEducation 1.0.8
notes: More button changed to icon grid window; added add/list/settings/picker icons, exit at bottom right.
Random picker supports JSON/CSV/TSV/TXT/XLSX/PPT/PPTX import; PPT exports slide thumbnails.
Drag-and-drop import supported; roster switcher in config window.
Weight uses squared calculation; slider scale adjusted so 0.01-1 takes about 1/6 of length.
Improved child window mutual-exclusion logic with more window.
